element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn cursor-based interaction (pointing, dragging, toggling)
Finding clues embedded in surroundings; examining items for puzzle information
Understanding Victorian-style artifact mechanics and their fictional cultural purpose
Solving increasingly complex puzzles requiring symbol interpretation
Navigating five islands of Age of Riven while remembering spatial relationships
Solving puzzles more numerous and complex than predecessor Myst

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully solving a puzzle and accessing a new area
Finding environmental clues that clarify puzzle logic
Using Zip Mode to revisit explored safe zones
Discovering item pickups and examining them
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering a locked mechanical gate or sealed area
Realizing spatial relationship complexity between five islands
Discovering puzzle dependencies on distant discoveries
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Slow-burn exploration with periodic gating; tension builds through accumulation of unsolved puzzles; relief comes through discovery and spatial mastery; Zip Mode allows players to control tension release timing

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Exploratory freedom without mandatory objectives; players can explore islands without fulfilling specific puzzle chains
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Mechanical artifacts with hidden purposes; environmental clues that reveal function and puzzle solutions embedded in surroundings

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to point-and-click navigation and basic environmental observation; simple cursor interaction learning
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mechanical contraptions requiring understanding of physical principles; symbol deciphering begins; multi-island spatial awareness develops
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex puzzle chains requiring synthesis of distant clues; understanding fictional cultural context of mechanisms; mastery of all five islands
notable_spikes: First major mechanical puzzle requiring physical principle understanding
Symbol deciphering sequences that demand pattern recognition across multiple areas
Multi-stage puzzles that gate access to new islands

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of five islands functions as a contained area with multiple interconnected mechanical puzzles; islands are gated by puzzle solutions; exploration of one island reveals clues for others
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Prison island where Catherine is held; volcanic landscape with steep cliffs and crater lakes

notable_level_patterns.description: Puzzle solutions and narrative context are embedded directly in the environment through artifacts, symbols, and interactable objects; no explicit quest markers or dialogue
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout Age of Riven - mechanical artifacts serve as both narrative props and puzzle components

notable_level_patterns.description: Access to new areas is controlled by solving mechanical contraptions (elevators, pipes, levers); understanding the contraption's purpose and physical principles is required before progression
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Transports and elevator systems connecting islands

sources_used: wikipedia - Riven article (Gameplay section, Plot section)
